# Q²M Soft Wipe EVO Towel









$8.99

Q²M SoftWipe EVO was redeveloped to suit the softest paints on the market. It’s extremely thick, but its gentle fibers are perfect for wiping coatings and all types of quick detailers and spray sealants. It’s the perfect choice for [Q²M CeramicDetailer](https://gyeonusa.com/products/q2m-ceramic-detailer?_pos=1&_sid=eed576e6c&_ss=r) or [Q²M Cure](https://gyeonusa.com/products/q2m-cure?_pos=1&_sid=a03f00b02&_ss=r). A major benefit is its edgeless trim, now even safer with the ultrasonic cut. The Q²M SoftWipe EVO is plush, thick, and very satisfying to use.

Hurry up! Sales Ends In

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/8e81fd0a-0d50-49cc-ac06-4f4bbca6b3d0/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 
![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/514bf285-7995-439a-92b3-8909439ad55a/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/lighter/) 

# LASER CUT

A major benefit of the Q M SoftWipe EVO is it s edgeless trim, making this towel ultra-safe. The Q M SoftWipe EVO Towel is fabricated using the most advanced laser-cutting technology, making edgeless microfibers very durable against wear.

# SOFT & THICK

Our Q M SoftWipe EVO fiber was developed to suit even the softest paints on the market. It s extremely thick, but gentle fibers are perfect for wiping coatings and all types of quick detailers and spray sealants. It s the perfect choice for our Q M Cure or it s Matte version.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/31e867c2-302d-4519-961d-2c138c4ea91e/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/) 

# PRO TIP

When applying a ceramic coating, use the Q M SoftWipe EVO as the final wipe down towel to remove any excess product from the initial wipe down. It s highly absorbent fibers will absorb any excess and reduce the chance of high spots.

# PRO TIP

When applying a ceramic coating, use the Q M SoftWipe EVO as the final wipe down towel to remove any excess product from the initial wipe down. It s highly absorbent fibers will absorb any excess and reduce the chance of high spots.
